textByHash.505e4c4b81f54e5a0fbf4ffa69d3ccda9e235c10: Who on earth do you think you are coming in here demanding an airtight pot...Can't you see that I have my own worries to think about?
textByHash.515750449d80a645c4edcafeff1c24f14a2ec72f: Well, if you must know, I'm working all the hours that Saradomin sends, I have to in order to make enough money to pay that loan shark Hammerspike!
textByHash.3685063c92acd20957e5caf49ddac3b88e0df1ba: I took over this abandoned pottery place with a loan from Hammerspike. He's demanding payment and I can barely just make the interest payments.
textByHash.4d7f81659151e64aae8e8f6650af2f8ef9b6b41d: I'm working as hard as I can but I'll never pay the loan off at this rate!
textByHash.6d0b6c8d941e21bcc72ad6ad506e51fa26d81cac: Well, that may be, but I have a rush order for a top paying customer that's going to keep Hammerspike off my back for a bit.
textByHash.f4e56eb4ee774de29b825c6ddfefd9eee6a68f40: If you really want that pot, you're going to have to deal with Hammerspike in the dwarven mines!
textByHash.17af4a8f6102740a1548651cd8accf4784a4e562: Well, that would be really great...I just hope he doesn't grind you into flour to make his bread, he's one of the most ruthless gangsters in the area.
textByHash.a8487293e740b576a955d5cb270b63a3d8d2ed72: Beware, his guards are incredibly loyal, they'll slit their own throats to protect him!
textByHash.fa4fabf4a5d806c1a2dddcfde91dab3bbddf1a50: He's in the dwarven mines somewhere, not sure exactly where though.
textByHash.efecbad211411386b7dc26d54d27d422a8351de1: Oh, well that's a real shame, I was hoping you could have sorted out that Hammerspike for me once and for all!
textByHash.36105afdeb93be703c5b4159588dd3e57d3025d4: So I see. What's the problem? Did you sort out Hammerspike?
textByHash.0f0a913dc4dd838ff4b3e83d1a6cac91ebe25a86: Go talk to Hammerspike in the Dwarven mines and see if you can get him to leave me alone...I won't be able to make you the airtight pot else.
textByHash.fb53e5081ba9a255e53a34129878dc322f3eb503: Really! Fantastic! Oh, I'm so grateful! Thanks so much! How ever can I repay you?
textByHash.58234852223c5a3b2693f3e5f0f872f9e97cc065: I'll do better than that! I'll show you how to make an airtight pot! First of all, you'll need some clay...here's some I have spare!
textByHash.a5341962c20137ba596cd34ffbf20c19be1ecace: Now, while pots are quite easy to make, lids are a bit different. They have to be quite precise to fit the pot exactly, which is why you have to be quite experienced to make them.
textByHash.40f1112975b4102316e8ded0ab7e30d54cb9b632: Ok then, just use it on the wheel over there!
textByHash.afd2165af745a1f62a86090980ddcb24d8ac308a: Please feel free to use the pottery wheel, I won't be using it all the time. Put your pots in the kiln when you've made one.
textByHash.967008b9f0ebd9a63be98992b9519d00c51c7346: And make sure you tidy up after yourself!
